zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Herbert於1435年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾洛維爾 萊明頓時，她的父親William ap Thomas  "Y Marchog glas o Went"11432歲，母親Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam51歲。她和Richard Greville至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1469年在英國諾薩普頓史爾享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Herbert于1435年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾洛維爾 萊明頓时，她的父亲William ap Thomas  "Y Marchog glas o Went"11432岁，母亲Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam51岁。她和Richard Greville至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1469年在英国諾薩普頓史爾享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Herbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German, English, and French: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. In Britain, this Old French name, introduced by the Normans, reinforced the less common Old English cognate Herebeorht. The surname was taken to Ireland after the Anglo-Norman invasion and in the 16th century.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the German personal name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Harbison
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): patronymic from the Older Scots and Middle English personal name Herbert (the change from -er- to -ar- was a common one in Old French and Middle English). An intrusive n later gave Harbinson .

variants.name: Hebard
meanings: variant of Herbert , with assimilation of the first r. Compare Hebb .

variants.name: Harbert
meanings: German and English: variant of   Herbert  .

variants.name: Herbers
meanings: German and Dutch: patronymic from   Herbert  . It is found mainly in Lower Saxony and across the Dutch border.

variants.name: Dickherber
meanings: Probably a nickname for a fat person by the name of Herbert , of which Herber is a short form, or, more likely, in the north from Die(c)kherber, a topographic and distinguishing name for a Herber living by the dike, see Dicke 2. Compare Dickmeyer .

variants.name: Hebert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Emile, Normand, Jacques, Marcel, Pierre, Lucien, Michel, Gaston, Alcide, Camille.
French (Hébert): assimilated form of Herbert . Compare Abair , Abar , Abare , Abear , Aber , Eber , and Ebert .

variants.name: Herber
meanings: German and Dutch: variant of   Herbert  .

variants.name: Herbertson
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): patronymic from the Older Scots and Middle English personal name   Herbert  .

variants.name: Hebb
meanings: English (East Yorkshire and northeast Midlands): from the Middle English personal name Hebb, Ebb, pet forms of Herbert .

variants.name: Herb
meanings: South German: nickname for a harsh or rough person, from Middle High German herb ‘tart, harsh’.
German: from the personal name Herpo, a pet form of Herbert .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Herbert was born in 1435, in Lower Lemington, Gloucestershire, England, her father, William ap Thomas  "Y Marchog glas o Went", was 11432 and her mother, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, was 51. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Richard Greville. She died in 1469, in Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Herbert est née en 1435, à Lower Lemington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, William ap Thomas  "Y Marchog glas o Went", avait 11432 ans et sa mère, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, avait 51 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Richard Greville. Elle est décédée en 1469, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Herbert 1435 in Lower Lemington, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William ap Thomas  "Y Marchog glas o Went" 11432 und ihre Mutter Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam 51. Sie hatte mit Richard Greville mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1469 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Herbert è nata il nel 1435 nel Lower Lemington, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, William ap Thomas  "Y Marchog glas o Went", aveva 11432 anni e sua madre, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, aveva 51 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Richard Greville. Morì nel 1469, nel Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Herbertが1435年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアロウエル レミントンで生まれた時，父William ap Thomas  "Y Marchog glas o Went"は11432歳，母Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gamは51歳であった。彼女はRichard Grevilleとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1469年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Herbert(이)가 1435년 영국 그루스스터실르 로어 러밍턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William ap Thomas  "Y Marchog glas o Went"(은)는 11432세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam(은)는 51세였다. 그녀는 Richard Greville(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1469년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Herbert nasceu em 1435, em Lower Lemington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William ap Thomas  "Y Marchog glas o Went", tinha 11432 anos e sua mãe, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, tinha 51 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Richard Greville. Ela faleceu em 1469, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Herbert родилась в 1435 г. в местности лоуир лемингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени William ap Thomas  "Y Marchog glas o Went" было 11432 года, а матери, которую звали Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, 51. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Richard Greville. Она умерла в 1469 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Herbert nació en 1435, en Lower Lemington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, William ap Thomas  "Y Marchog glas o Went", tenía 11432 años y su mamá, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, tenía 51 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Richard Greville. Murió en 1469, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 34 años.
